I'm going to be honest. I started using this app and when I actually use it I sleep a lot better. Bear in mind I don't sleep well. I have never slept well, I have always had trouble falling asleep but something about listening to wind on a mountain or a lightning storm, it helps me fall asleep. Right up until then lightning cracks and I like that but my cat doesn't and he freaks out. But other than my cat running away and making a lot of noise when the thunder goes off, I sleep pretty good.

There needs to be a way to adjust volume the volume of what is being played in the app. Other sleep sound apps have figured this out. If I want the sleep sounds cape to be quiet, I shouldn't have to turn ALL bluetooth sound down, there are some notifications I need to hear loud and clear. so being able to keep Bluetooth volume high, and just turn the individual sounds in the app down using a slider would work much better.
its a little early to say, but this may be just what I need.
